title: Remote & SSH (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk remote access, SSH, dan remote management di Windows.

commands.name: ssh-win
commands.title: ssh — Secure Shell (Windows 10+)
commands.description: OpenSSH client bawaan Windows 10+ untuk koneksi remote yang aman.
commands.examples:
# Koneksi SSH
ssh user@192.168.1.100

# Port tertentu
ssh -p 2222 user@server.com

# Dengan key file
ssh -i C:\Users\me\.ssh\id_rsa user@server

# Port forwarding
ssh -L 8080:localhost:80 user@server

# Generate SSH key
ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "email@example.com"

# Copy key ke server
type $env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\id_ed25519.pub | ssh user@server "cat >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys"

# SCP - Salin file via SSH
scp file.txt user@server:/home/user/
scp user@server:/home/user/file.txt C:\Downloads\
scp -r folder user@server:/home/user/

commands.name: mstsc
commands.title: mstsc — Remote Desktop
commands.description: Membuka Remote Desktop Connection untuk mengakses komputer Windows lain secara grafis.
commands.examples:
# Buka RDP dialog
mstsc

# Koneksi langsung
mstsc /v:192.168.1.100

# Full screen
mstsc /v:server.com /f

# Dengan ukuran window
mstsc /v:server.com /w:1280 /h:720

commands.name: winrm-ps
commands.title: WinRM & PSRemoting
commands.description: Windows Remote Management dan PowerShell Remoting untuk manajemen server jarak jauh.
commands.examples:
# Aktifkan remoting (di server)
Enable-PSRemoting -Force

# Sesi interaktif
Enter-PSSession -ComputerName Server01

# Jalankan perintah remote
Invoke-Command -ComputerName Server01 -ScriptBlock { Get-Process }

# Multiple server
Invoke-Command -ComputerName Server01, Server02 -ScriptBlock { Get-Service }

# Dengan kredensial
$cred = Get-Credential
Enter-PSSession -ComputerName Server01 -Credential $cred

# Salin file ke remote
Copy-Item -Path file.txt -Destination C:\Remote\ -ToSession $session

commands.name: net-share
commands.title: net share / net use — Network Shares
commands.description: Mengelola folder sharing dan koneksi ke shared folder di jaringan.
commands.examples:
# List share lokal
net share

# Buat share
net share Data=C:\SharedData /grant:Everyone,READ

# Map network drive
net use Z: \\server\share

# Map dengan kredensial
net use Z: \\server\share /user:DOMAIN\username password

# Persistent mapping
net use Z: \\server\share /persistent:yes

# Disconnect
net use Z: /delete

# PowerShell
New-SmbShare -Name "Data" -Path "C:\SharedData" -ReadAccess "Everyone"
New-PSDrive -Name Z -PSProvider FileSystem -Root \\server\share -Persist
